philosophy: Every offer must make a small publisher say 'This helps my readers.' No backlink ask in first message.

offers.name: Mortgage Widget Embed
best_page_type_to_pitch: how much house can I afford guides
offers.offer_text: Free embeddable mortgage affordability calculator — your readers enter income/debts/down payment, see exactly what home price fits their budget. No signup, no data collection, mobile-friendly.
offers.example_cta: Would this be useful for your readers? I can send the embed code — takes 30 seconds to add.
offers.risk: low — non-competitive, genuinely useful for real estate audience

offers.name: Debt Payoff Widget Embed
best_page_type_to_pitch: how to pay off debt fast guides
offers.offer_text: Free snowball vs avalanche debt payoff calculator — your readers input their actual debts and see side-by-side which method saves more money and gets them debt-free faster. No signup, no data collection.
offers.example_cta: Would your readers find this useful? I can send the one-line embed code.
offers.risk: low — strong fit for debt-focused blogs

offers.name: Custom Calculation Example
target_site_types: any finance blog with a specific article that uses numbers/calculations
best_page_type_to_pitch: articles that say 'if you save X at Y% for Z years...'
how much to save for college articles
offers.offer_text: I noticed your article about [specific topic] uses [specific calculation]. I can create a custom interactive version of that calculation — readers can plug in their own numbers instead of just reading a static example. No signup, completely free.
offers.example_cta: Would a custom interactive version of that calculation be useful for your article? Happy to build one for you.
offers.risk: medium — requires manual work per prospect, but highest conversion potential

offers.name: Broken/Outdated Resource Replacement
target_site_types: resource pages with old/broken calculator links
financial advisor sites with tool pages
best_page_type_to_pitch: pages referencing calculators that no longer exist
pages with calculators that don't work on mobile
offers.offer_text: I noticed your [resource page / article] links to [broken/outdated calculator]. I have an updated, mobile-friendly version that does the same thing — your readers would get a working tool instead of a dead link. Free, no signup.
offers.example_cta: Would you like the updated link/embed to replace the broken one?
offers.risk: low — fixing a broken resource is genuinely helpful

offers.name: Mini Data/Comparison Table
offers.offer_text: I can give you a small calculation table for your article about [topic] — showing [specific comparison] at different [variables]. Your readers get real numbers instead of general advice. No signup, I'll create it specifically for your article.
offers.example_cta: Would a comparison table with real numbers help your article? I can put one together.
